thought.text: I will now update the task tracker to mark the analysis phase as completed and start the implementation of the Blog pages.

task_list.title: Analyze UI structure and schema
task_list.notes: Analyze the existing client directory, App.tsx, AppShell.tsx, and the auto-generated rhino.d.ts schema to understand the exact field names and types.

task_list.title: Create Blog pages
task_list.notes: Create the Blogs list page, detail page, and create/edit form page under client/src/pages/.

task_list.title: Configure routing and navigation
task_list.notes: Add the routes for the new pages in client/src/App.tsx and add navigation links in client/src/components/AppShell.tsx.

task_list.title: Verify UI integration
task_list.notes: Verify that the pages load correctly and integrate with the backend API hooks.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"summary": "Update task tracker to start creating Blog pages", "security_risk": "LOW", "task_list": [{"notes": "Analyze the existing client directory, App.tsx, AppShell.tsx, and the auto-generated rhino.d.ts schema to understand the exact field names and types.", "status": "done", "title": "Analyze UI structure and schema"}, {"notes": "Create the Blogs list page, detail page, and create/edit form page under client/src/pages/.", "title": "Create Blog pages", "status": "in_progress"}, {"title": "Configure routing and navigation", "status": "todo", "notes": "Add the routes for the new pages in client/src/App.tsx and add navigation links in client/src/components/AppShell.tsx."}, {"notes": "Verify that the pages load correctly and integrate with the backend API hooks.", "status": "todo", "title": "Verify UI integration"}], "command": "plan"}

summary: Update task tracker to start creating Blog pages
